title: Unbounded audio buffer memory growth — 30s cap added
notes: Fixed: MAX_AUDIO_BUFFER_SAMPLES caps at 30s of 16kHz audio. Forces stop_listening when exceeded.

title: XSS in renderMarkdown — escape HTML before markdown transforms
notes:
Fixed: renderMarkdown() now calls escapeHtml() before applying markdown regex transforms.
Committed in f7aa6ab. renderMarkdown escapes HTML before markdown transforms.

title: Runtime pip install in tts.py — removed
notes: Fixed: replaced with ImportError warning to add to requirements.txt.

title: CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins=['*'] — fixed to False
notes: Fixed: allow_credentials=False. Credentials not needed for WebSocket voice interface.

title: Barge-in support: interrupt AI response when user starts speaking
notes: Barge-in requires server-side VAD endpointing first (bd-2o6). Also needs audio buffer management during playback.

title: Server-side VAD endpointing for continuous mode
Upgrade STT from base to small model for better accuracy
notes: STT upgraded from base to small model. systemd env var updated.

title: Duplicated TTS synthesis logic — extracted speak_sentence()
notes: Extracted async speak_sentence() helper. SENTENCE_SEPS constant replaces inline list.

title: Dead code: streaming.py removed (182 lines)
notes: Removed streaming.py — never imported, actual streaming was in main.py.

title: Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK hit / instead of /health
Health endpoint reached into private attrs — added status() methods
notes: Fixed: tts.status() and stt.status() return clean dicts. Health endpoint uses those instead of _private_attr access.

title: Duplicated system_prompt default — single source in backend.py
notes: Fixed: Settings now has placeholder 'unused_in_openclaw_mode'. Single source of truth in backend.py (VOICE_SYSTEM_HINT + FULL_SYSTEM_PROMPT).

title: Shared global backend instance — per-connection state needed for multi-user
notes: For OpenClaw mode this is safe (no per-session state on the server). For direct OpenAI mode, conversation_history leaks across WebSocket clients. Startup warning added. Real fix: per-connection AIBackend instances or per-session history dict. Low priority since Olympus uses OpenClaw gateway.

title: TTS voice selection per agent (Métis F2, Atlas deep, etc)
notes: Implemented: ChatterboxTTS.AGENT_VOICE_MAP class attribute, dynamic voice switching on agent selection, health endpoint reports map.

title: Conversation history with context window management
notes: OpenClaw gateway mode sends only voice hint + user message. No history duplication. Gateway owns conversation memory for cross-channel continuity.

title: WebRTC transport for lower latency audio
Latency metrics in response_complete WebSocket message
notes: Implemented: response_complete now includes latency object with stt_ms, first_token_ms, first_audio_ms, llm_total_ms, total_ms, audio_duration_s, sentences. Server logs Pipeline summary per request.

title: Version strings aligned to 0.3.0
notes: pyproject.toml and FastAPI both at 0.3.0 now.

title: /api/keys open when auth disabled — document as dev-mode only
notes: Intentional for local dev. Startup warning exists. For production, require auth or restrict /api/keys.

title: Latency metrics dashboard in UI
notes: Replaced by per-request latency logging in response_complete message + structured server logs. No separate dashboard needed.

title: Docker containerization
Mobile-optimized UI improvements
